# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---|---|
| 2.0.x | ✅ Yes |
| < 2.0 | ❌ No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this extension, please report it responsibly.

### How to Report

1. **Do NOT open a public issue** for security vulnerabilities
2. Instead, please report via [GitHub Security Advisories](../../security/advisories/new)
3. Or email the maintainers directly (if listed in the repository)

### What to Include

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested fix (if you have one)

### Response Timeline

- **Acknowledgment:** Within 48 hours
- **Assessment:** Within 1 week
- **Fix:** As soon as possible, depending on severity

### What to Expect

- We will acknowledge your report promptly
- We will investigate and assess the vulnerability
- We will work on a fix and coordinate the disclosure
- We will credit you in the release notes (unless you prefer to remain anonymous)

## Security Considerations

This extension:
- Only runs on YouTube domains
- Does not collect or transmit any user data
- Does not execute remote code
- Uses only the minimum required browser permissions
- Is fully open source for audit

## Best Practices for Users

- Always install extensions from trusted sources
- Keep your browser and extensions updated
- Review extension permissions before installing
- Report suspicious behavior immediately
